about_summary: 👋 I'm Jihoon, a Full-stack Developer who completes projects by leveraging diverse technical stacks to deliver functional services. I have built development capabilities by directly planning and implementing various projects, including React/React Native frontends, Spring Boot/Node.js backend APIs, and real-time services using WebSocket. I focus not just on 'making things,' but constantly considering why a specific technology was chosen and how to create better structure and user experience.

about_sections.title: Front-end Development Focused on User Experience
details: I have primarily used React and React Native to design web and mobile UIs, prioritizing user flow and interaction.
In my graduation project, I improved the UI/UX based on actual user surveys and enhanced usability by redesigning the search and category structure.

I focus on creating easy-to-use services, moving beyond just visually appealing interfaces, through the application of TypeScript, responsive layouts, and performance optimization (e.g., lazy loading, eliminating unnecessary rendering).

about_sections.title: A Development Approach Focused on Complete Problem Solving
details: I adhere to the principle of always resolving shortcomings from a previous project in the next one.

I have consistently verified the entire process: **'Why is it inconvenient → How to fix it → Has it actually improved?'** This included refactoring JavaScript-based projects entirely to TypeScript, replacing slow build environments with Vite, and structurally solving issues of redundant data and logic.
Through this process, I naturally acquired a feel for code quality, maintainability, and performance.

about_sections.title: Data-Driven Developer
details: I prefer to make decisions based on data rather than relying on intuition.

In my graduation project, I adjusted feature priorities by analyzing user survey results, and in personal projects, I improved UI and data flow by analyzing API response structures and usage patterns.
I gained experience interpreting data and connecting it to insights through YouTube and IMDB data analysis projects, affirming the importance of evidence and metrics in development.

about_conclusion: I aim for development that solves user problems, not technology for technology's sake. I strive to be a developer who grows by quickly learning in new environments and constantly thinking about better structures.

projects.title: Graduation Project - Photographer & Client Matching Platform
projects.description: Developed a React Native-based mobile platform to match photographers with clients. Implemented a minimum viable product (MVP) at a practical usage level, including portfolio viewing, booking features, reviews, and community functions. Achieved a stable user experience by resolving issues like API latency and mass data rendering typical in mobile environments.

projects.title: Nobel Laureate Information Website (TypeScript Refactoring)
projects.description: Developed a website to explore Nobel Prize laureate information based on the official Nobel Prize API. Significantly improved type safety and performance by fully migrating the existing JavaScript project to a Vite + TypeScript foundation. Personally designed logic for duplicate motivation removal, responsive UI, and search functionalities.

projects.title: Data Analysis Project 1 - YouTube Channel Analysis
projects.description: Collected YouTube API data to analyze factors driving views and subscriber growth, and created a dashboard using Tableau. Experience in building a practical data pipeline, including batch collection of API data, database storage, and KPI-based visualization.

projects.title: Data Analysis Project 2 - IMDB Movie Data Analysis
projects.description: A project utilizing IMDB movie data to analyze genre trends and box office drivers. Performed data preprocessing and analysis using Python and implemented intuitive visualization through Tableau.

projects.title: Spring Boot-based Bulletin Board Web Application
projects.description: Developed a web application using Spring Boot and JPA, including features for posts, comments, and likes. Gained practical experience with Spring Security and backend architecture by resolving authentication conflict issues arising from a mixed MVC/REST API structure.

projects.title: Spring Boot-based RESTful Bulletin Board API
projects.description: Built a RESTful bulletin board API based on authentication and authorization using Spring Boot and JWT. Personally designed a structure close to real-world applications, including data ownership verification, refactoring duplicate code, and implementing MySQL as the operating database.

projects.title: Real-time Multilingual Translation Chat Web
projects.description: Developed a translation chat web utilizing WebSocket and Google Translation API, allowing real-time conversation between users with different languages. Designed the full-stack structure, including Socket.IO-based real-time communication, MongoDB data storage, and translation API integration.

experience.title: Full-stack Developer
technologies: Experience across the entire service lifecycle (Planning to Deployment)
